title: Iron Age
description: Embrace the process of iron evolution, craft advanced tools with the power to surpass end-game originating from the mere iron you have in your junk chest.
body:
Embrace the process of iron evolution, craft advanced tools with the power to surpass end-game originating from the mere iron you have in your junk chest.

The first evolution of iron invovles blasting it to reinforce it's durability and overall effectiveness to greater heights, where it turns to steel, it'll become stronger than iron, but weaker than diamond as a "middle-point" in progress.
